title: Verify taskify file mode creates proper sub-issues
description: Verify kody-engine taskify --file docs/test-prd.md creates sub-issues with: (1) priority labels (priority:high, priority:medium, priority:low), (2) ## Test Strategy, ## Context, ## Acceptance Criteria sections per sub-issue, (3) dependency-ordered filing via topological sort. Pipeline currently running taskify stage on issue 2004.
